title: Polycell One Coat Damp Seal 1L
description: From the manufacturer Be Inspired Denim Drift is a deep blue-grey shade with a timeless quality. Combine it with pure white or natural wood for a modern crisp effect. Choose this shade if you want to create a confident, creative space. Nutmeg White is a pale neutral with the tiniest hint of pink. This gives it warmth, which makes it perfect for combining with similar shades. Choose this colour if you’d like a relaxed, modern room with a light, airy feel. Pressed Petal is a medium depth woody pink. It’s a strong colour choice for your bedroom or living room. This grownup, dusky pink combines beautifully with other greyed off colours and can be used as a block colour around the whole room. Chic Shadow is a mid-tone, pure grey. It has a touch of warmth that ensures it’s welcoming, as well as sleek and modern. Choose this shade if you have good natural light and want to create a cool, neutral room where you will be able to think clearly and unwind.
